acceptedAnswer.text: Clear, direct answer in 40–60 words. No preamble. Start with the definition. Include one specific fact or number if possible.
Step-by-step explanation. Keep each step to one sentence. Aim for 3–5 steps maximum.
Specific pricing or pricing range. If pricing varies, explain the factors. Link to pricing page.

mainEntity.name: What are the alternatives to [your product/service]?

acceptedAnswer.text: List 3–5 genuine alternatives with one differentiating sentence each. Be honest — AI rewards balanced answers.
